title: Planet Labs PBC (PL) Stock Forecast & Analyst Price Targets
text:
Planet Labs stock forecast reflects analyst expectations of continued growth and profitability expansion. The company is forecast to grow earnings and revenue by 33.1% and 23.9% per annum respectively, significantly outpacing broader market growth rates. EPS growth is expected at 31.7% per annum, reflecting improving unit economics.

Analyst price targets for Planet Labs (PL) vary across research firms, with consensus around $35.00 and a range from $20.00 to $40.00. The high price target of $40.00 reflects bullish scenarios where the company successfully executes on its satellite deployment roadmap and defense contracts accelerate further. The lower $20.00 target represents more conservative scenarios.

Planet Labs' fiscal 2026 results support the bullish analyst consensus. Record quarterly revenue of $86.8 million (11.55% beat), full-year revenue of $307.7 million (26% growth), and the achievement of profitability with $15.5 million adjusted EBITDA demonstrate execution capability. Free cash flow of $52.9 million indicates financial strength.

The $900 million backlog provides substantial revenue visibility with approximately 85% from annual or multi-year contracts. This provides confidence that the company can deliver on fiscal 2027 guidance of $415-440 million revenue (35-43% growth). The Defense & Intelligence segment's 50%+ growth validates analyst expectations that government defense spending on satellite intelligence will continue accelerating.

Key upside catalysts include major contract announcements, quarterly earnings beats, and successful satellite constellation expansion. The NVIDIA AI partnership opens new revenue opportunities and enhances competitive positioning. Downside risks include execution delays on satellite launches and potential macro headwinds affecting government spending.
